animals.Name: Dollie
animals.Description:
Dollie is a young mixed-breed girl with a big personality and an even bigger heart. She’s active, sweet, and absolutely loves to play, whether that’s running around, tossing toys, or just having fun with her people.
Dollie does well with kids and enjoys being part of an active home. When it comes to other dogs, she can be a little bossy, so she may do best with dogs who don’t mind her confident style or as the only dog in the home. Her compatibility with cats is currently unknown.
If you’re looking for a fun-loving, affectionate pup who’s always ready for the next adventure, Dollie could be your perfect match. Come meet her and see if she’s the one for you! Apply at ghhs.org

animals.Name: Skunk
animals.Description:
Meet SKUNK.   She is a FELV+ guest in our Haven.  She is a senior feline who is the epitome of sweetness. Skunk is super friendly.  Her gentle nature and love of cuddles are heartwarming.  
Skunk is a petite little girl.  Her black coat is accented by white flashes on her head.  Most unique!
Skunk is a precious little girl who just wants a home to call her own.  Come meet Skunk in The Haven or apply at ghhs.org.

animals.Name: Woodstock (Meeko)
animals.Description:
Meet Woodstock! Unfortunately, due to no fault of his own Woodstock has found himself back at GHHS.
If you’re looking for a loyal sidekick with a goofy grin and a love for adventure, Woodstock might just be your perfect match! This handsome boy is full of personality, playful, smart, and always ready to make you laugh.
Woodstock’s favorite things in the world? Water, toys, and balls! Whether he’s splashing around, chasing his favorite squeaky toy, or showing off his fetching skills, he’s happiest when he’s having fun with his people.
He’s a clever guy who picks up on training quickly and loves to stay busy. A home that enjoys playtime, outdoor adventures, and keeping his brain engaged will make him thrive.
Woodstock gets along great with other dogs and would love a canine buddy to romp around with. However, he’s not a fan of cats and would do best in a home without them. Because he can get a little too enthusiastic during play, he’s looking for an adult-only home or one with older teens who understand his playful energy.
If you’re ready for a life filled with laughs, splashes, and plenty of tail wags, come meet Woodstock, the lovable goofball who’s sure to steal your heart! 

Woodstock's adoption fee is covered by Stanely Steemer with an approved application. Apply at ghhs.org

animals.Name: Cartman
animals.Description:
Cartman is a sweet, loving goofball with energy for days and a heart full of love! He’s always excited to make new friends and is happiest when he’s getting attention, playing, or hanging out with his favorite people.

Cartman has a past back-leg injury that gives him a little side-sit and a wider walk — we think it just adds to his charm! Our veterinarian recommends joint supplements and possibly some physical therapy to help build muscle, but don’t worry: it doesn’t slow him down, doesn’t affect his daily life, and doesn’t cause him any pain.

Cartman is a happy, active pup ready to wiggle his way into your heart and your home. Come meet him and see his adorable swagger for yourself!

animals.Name: Kay Rose
animals.Description:
Kay Rose is the longest guest in our cat room. 
She is a sweet, quiet girl. After months in the cat room, enduring hundreds of often noisy visitors, she might be a tad shy and a little thorny.  But like the rose, those thorns serve to protect a beautiful, sensitive soul.  Kay Rose just needs a little time to warm up, but when she does, she just might let you rub her belly.  She loves a calm environment.  Kay Rose likes to be the only cat.

Kay Rose eats special dry food for her sensitive digestive system - Hill’s Prescription Diet Z/D (4 lb bag - $29).  She eats about 1/2 cup a day.  She’s well worth it!

Kay Rose is a lovely brown tabby with big, dreamy, green eyes that don’t miss a thing.

Come meet Kay Rose.  Spend some time with her and fall in love.   Apply for her at ghhs.org.

animals.Name: Locke "Zuma"
animals.Description:
Say hello to Locke, a young mixed breed with a whole lot of heart and even more energy! With his wagging tail and goofy grin, Locke is the kind of dog who brings instant joy wherever he goes.
Locke is a friendly, playful guy who’s still discovering the world, and loving every minute of it. He’s got that classic puppy personality: curious, bouncy, and always up for fun. Whether it’s a game of fetch, a walk around the neighborhood, or just romping around with other dogs, Locke is all in!
He does well with other dogs and enjoys having canine buddies to play with. He does okay with kids, too, especially ones who understand that he’s still learning and growing. Like any young pup, Locke is working on his manners and would thrive with a family ready to guide him through training and provide plenty of exercise and structure. Come meet him or apply at ghhs.org!

animals.Name: Bandit
animals.Description:
BANDIT!
Looking for a quiet companion who prefers doing her own thing? Then look no further than this pleasantly plump tabby gal.  Bandit enjoys having a nice quiet place to hang out where she can feel safe.

Although Bandit can offer quiet companionship she would prefer to not be held.  As a senior girl, this kitty has learned what she does and doesn't like and isn't afraid to tell you!  Bandit does love chicken temptation treats and gentle head scratches. Bandit does require a prescription urinary wet food to keep her happy and healthy. 

Bandit has lived with other cats and did okay but she might enjoy being a solo pet.  Apply at ghhs.org

animals.Name: Hannah
animals.Description:
**In foster - please call ahead to meet** 

Meet Hannah, a stunning beauty with impeccable manners. Hannah will thrive in a calm, adults-only home where she can be the only dog. She’s not a fan of sharing the spotlight with children or other pups, but she gets along great with cats - so feline friends are welcome! 

This smart girl is fully housetrained and can comfortably stay home alone for a few hours while you’re out. When you’re together, she’s happiest playing with her favorite toys or snuggling up for some quiet company.

 Hannah rides great in the car when necessary, but she's a bit of a homebody who doesn't mind staying in. Does this easygoing, affectionate gal sound like your type? She might just be your perfect match!

animals.Name: Catfish
animals.Description:
Meet Catfish, a medium-sized mixed breed with a big heart and an even bigger smile! This happy-go-lucky pup loves nothing more than heading out for walks and making new friends along the way. Catfish is a social butterfly with other dogs and would thrive in a home with a canine companion to play with.
He’s full of love, energy, and enthusiasm, just don’t introduce him to any cats (he prefers his friends to have wagging tails!). If you’re looking for a joyful, loyal buddy who will keep life bright and fun (and you have no cats), Catfish is your guy! Apply at ghhs.org

animals.Name: Violet
animals.Description:
Meet Violet! This gorgeous dilute tortie queen rocks her one-eyed look with confidence and style. She’s friendly, playful, and happy to coexist with other cats. Give her a spring or wand toy and watch her go! Loving, but not overly cuddly, Violet is an independent soul who appreciates both companionship and her “me time.”
She does have allergies that require simple daily meds, but she doesn’t let that slow her down one bit. Come meet her or apply at ghhs.org!

animals.Name: Iris
animals.Description:
Meet IRIS.  Meet her feet and toe beans.  She is especially proud of them.  They ARE particularly cute.  She thinks that’s all you need to know about her.
We think we should also mention her nose freckle.  Boop. Boop.  And her snowy white coat, accented with striking tabby stripes.

(Well, also... She is friendly and sweet.  She likes people, including kids, and other cats.)

Come meet Iris and her adorable feet.
You can apply for Iris at GHHS.org.

animals.Name: Princess Fiona
animals.Description:
Princess Fiona is a regal 2 year old brindle boxer mix who will melt your heart and keep you moving.  Fiona likes chin scritches and has her cuddly side, but she mostly likes to move!  Fiona is a playgroup superstar. 
 She is an athlete and would be very well suited for a household that is active and favors an outdoorsy lifestyle but also has time for evening snuggles and relaxation. Princess Fiona is a talented fence jumper, so she’ll need secure supervision outdoors or a home with a tall, sturdy fence to keep her safe.
Come by for a visit and ask a staff member to bring The Princess out to the fields for a romp!

animals.Name: Luna
animals.Description:
Meet LUNA!
Luna is a FIV+ guest in our Haven.  She is a super friendly girl who would love nothing more than to have a warm, comfy lap to sleep on. She loves pets, snuggled, and attention.  Luna might reach her cute little paw out if she's not done being loved.  She gets along with friendly male kitties but can be a bully to female cats.

Luna has a lovely silver-gray coat and bright, green eyes. Check out her fashion forward black “eye liner.”

Come meet Luna. Adopt this sweetheart!  Apply at GHHS.org

animals.Name: Lilah
animals.Description:
Personality: Sweet, affectionate, social
Good With: Playgroups, people, attention

Lilah is a beautiful girl who came to us with an old injury but has not let that dim her spirit. She is gentle, loving, and eager to be around people. Lilah enjoys spending time in playgroups and thrives on affection from staff and volunteers.

She is heading to foster this weekend, where she will enjoy some extra comfort while she continues her journey toward finding her forever home.

If you are looking for a sweet, resilient companion, Lilah may be the perfect match. Come meet her today.

animals.Name: Merriweather
animals.Description:
This charming domestic shorthair tuxedo girl is as sweet as her name suggests. Merriweather is a friendly, sweet girl. She gets along wonderfully with other cats, making her a great fit for multi-cat households. She prefers a dog-free home, though, dogs aren’t her favorite, and she’d be happiest in a calm, canine-free environment.
If you’re looking for a loving, easygoing kitty with classic tuxedo charm, Merriweather is ready to steal your heart. Come meet her or apply at ghhs.org

animals.Name: Good Boy
animals.Description:
This handsome good boy is a mixed-breed bundle of energy looking for his forever home! Full of classic puppy enthusiasm, he's always ready to run, play, and explore. Whether it's hiking through the woods or trotting alongside your bike, he's the perfect partner for an active lifestyle.
He gets along great with female dogs and would thrive with a playful canine sister. No cats for this guy, he’s got a little too much curiosity for that. He’s currently working on his leash manners and making good progress with consistent training.
If you're looking for a fun, loyal, and energetic companion who’s ready to go on life’s adventures with you, come meet this awesome pup today!

animals.Name: Skelly
animals.Description:
Skelly is a handsome black-and-white Domestic Shorthair. He can be a little shy at first, but once he warms up, his sweet and affectionate side truly shines. Skelly enjoys quiet company and would love a calm home where he can take his time to build trust and show off his loving personality.
He’s not a fan of loud noises or lots of hustle and bustle, so he’d do best in a home without small children. We’re not sure yet how he feels about other cats or dogs, but with a patient introduction, he might do just fine.
If you’re looking for a loyal companion who will reward your patience with plenty of purrs and love, Skelly might just be your perfect match. Apply at ghhs.org

animals.Name: Chalupa
animals.Description:
**IN FOSTER** Chalupa is a sweet, senior Chihuahua with a heart full of love. This little guy adores snuggling and being close to his people—your lap is his favorite place to be! He’s gentle, affectionate, and happiest when he’s part of the action.

Chalupa does great with kids and gets along well with other pets, making him a wonderful companion for just about any home. He is currently in a foster home, so if you’re interested in meeting this lovable boy, we’d be happy to set up a meet and greet. Come see if Chalupa is your perfect match!

animals.Name: Mister
animals.Description:
Meet MISTER!
Mister is a FIV+ guest at our Haven.  Mister is a handsome black-and-white tuxedo boy with a soft heart and a shy soul. He’s the perfect match for someone who appreciates a gentle, low-key friend.
Even though Mister is FIV positive, don't let that deter you though, he can still have a long, happy life. Come meet him or apply at ghhs.org

animals.Name: Peppermint Patty
animals.Description:
PEPPERMINT PATTY!
Peppermint Patty is a FeLV+ guest in our Haven.  She is a playful, little sprite.  She is a friendly tease with visitors to the Haven.  Catch her, if you can!!!  Patty gets along with other friendly kitties.

Peppermint Patty is a delightful tabby, with big, curious eyes.

 Come meet this girl.  Apply at GHHS.org.

animals.Name: Marcie
animals.Description:
Meet MARCIE!
Marcie is a FeLV+ guest in our Haven.  She is super friendly and playful.  Marcie loves attention and snuggles.  She gets along with other friendly kitties.

Marcie is a yummy, black house panther with beautiful gold eyes.

Come meet Marcie. She is irresistible!  Apply at GHHS.org.

animals.Name: Marmalade
animals.Description:
MARMALADE! 
She is a FeLV+ guest at our Haven.  She is a super friendly, and confident girl.  Marmalade loves to greet visitors to the Haven.  She is an attention hog!!!  She gets along with other friendly cats.

Marmalade is a poofy, fluffy puff ball with big amber eyes.  Her fur is bunny soft, and silky,

Come meet Marmalade.  We know you will fall in love with her.  Apply at GHHS.org.

animals.Name: Dolly Parton
animals.Description: Just like her namesake, Dolly Parton is full of charm, warmth, and personality! She’s friendly, confident, and always ready to make new friends. Dolly loves attention, playtime, and spreading joy wherever she goes.

animals.Name: Mayo
animals.Description:
I'm Heartworm Positive

Mayo is a friendly, large mixed-breed boy with a big heart and an even bigger love for people. He enjoys going on walks and is always happy to be by your side, whether you’re out exploring or relaxing at home. Mayo gets along wonderfully with kids, cats, and other dogs, making him a great fit for many types of families.
Mayo is heartworm positive, as of 12/26/25 he has begun his 3 month long treatment to become a healthy, happy dog!
If you’re looking for a gentle, social companion who fits right in with the whole household, Mayo might be your perfect match. Come meet him or apply at ghhs. org

animals.Name: Sammy Boy
animals.Description:
Big SAMMY BOY!
Sammy a FIV+ guest in our Haven.  He is a big boy with a big heart, and an even bigger love for people. He came from an outdoor life where he got into some scuffles, giving him that distinctive right ear.  Sammy Boy actually gets along with other friendly cats.  He is super affectionate and loves snuggles, pets and attention.

Sammy Boy is BIG.  Really BIG.  He’s 17 lbs of glorious, squeezable bigness.  He has a soft ginger coat and beautiful peridot eyes.

FIV+ cats can live long, happy lives.  If you’re looking for a sweet, cuddly companion who will adore you back, Sammy Boy is your guy.  Apply at GHHS.org.

animals.Name: Ginny
animals.Description:
Ginny is a beautiful tuxedo girl with a gentle soul and a quiet charm. She’s a little shy at first, but once she feels safe, her sweet and loving personality begins to shine through. Ginny has finished raising her kittens and is now ready to be the one who gets cared for and cherished.
She enjoys calm environments and would likely do best with someone patient who will let her settle in at her own pace. Once she trusts you, Ginny shows her softer side and appreciates gentle attention and peaceful companionship.
Ginny’s experience with dogs or other cats is unknown, so slow introductions (or being your one-and-only) may be best for her comfort. Apply at ghhs.org

animals.Name: Silas
animals.Description:
Presenting SILAS.
Silas is a FeLV+ guest in our Haven. He is a friendly, sweet boy. Silas has a head tilt and, occasionally, an unbalanced gait.  But these do not slow him down or affect his affectionate personality.  Silas gets along with other friendly cats.

Silas is a delightful, black, mini panther with green/gold eyes.

Come meet this boy.  Apply at GHHS.org.

animals.Name: Blair
animals.Description: Blair is a sweet little Chihuahua mix with a gentle soul. She’s been a devoted mama to her puppies and now it’s her turn to be spoiled. Blair loves affection, enjoys calm companionship, and would thrive in a cozy home where she can feel safe and loved. She’s ready to leave mom life behind and settle into her forever home.

animals.Name: Kelvin
animals.Description: Kelvin is a cute, playful boy with a big personality! Owner surrendered through no fault of his own, he’s spunky, energetic, and loves playing with his adopted brother, Flurry. Kelvin is ready to bring fun and happiness to his forever home.

animals.Name: TreeBeard
animals.Description:
Treebeard is a big sweetheart who came to us as an owner surrender because he didn’t get along with some of the other cats in his previous home. He’s feeling a little scared right now in the shelter environment, but with some patience and a calm space, he warms up and shows his loving nature.

Treebeard would do best in a home where he can feel safe and comfortable—possibly as the only cat or with slow, thoughtful introductions. Once he settles in, his gentle and affectionate personality truly shines.

animals.Name: Pretzel
animals.Description:
tzel is a sweet and friendly female guinea pig who loves spending time with people. She’s very comfortable being handled and enjoys gentle attention, making her a wonderful companion for someone looking for an interactive little friend.
Pretzel is currently living on her own, but she has successfully lived with another female guinea pig in the past and could potentially do so again with proper introductions. One of her favorite things in the world is fresh veggies, mealtime is definitely the highlight of her day!
She’ll thrive in a home that can provide her with a large living area, which is important for her happiness and health. With plenty of space, tasty vegetables, and loving care, Pretzel will make an adorable and rewarding addition to the right home. Apply at ghhs.org

animals.Name: Mocha Joan
animals.Description:
Mocha Joan is a beautiful, long-haired black girl with a shy demeanor and a very sweet heart. She may take a little time to warm up, but once she feels safe, her gentle personality truly shines. Mocha Joan could do well with other friendly, respectful cats, though her feelings about kids and dogs are still unknown.
Her gorgeous long coat will need daily brushing, which can also be a wonderful bonding time for her and her future person. Mocha Joan would likely thrive in a calm, patient home where she can settle in at her own pace and feel loved and secure.
If you’re looking for a quiet, sweet companion and don’t mind a little extra grooming, Mocha Joan may be the perfect addition to your home. Apply at ghhs.org

animals.Name: Eli
animals.Description:
Introducing ELI.
Eli is a sweet, affectionate kitty.  He is a total lovebug who adores snuggles, and being close to his people.  If you’re looking for a gentle companion who will happily curl up with you and share all the affection, Eli is your boy.  He is ready to steal your heart.

Eli is a big, handsome, brown tabby with a full compliment of stripes and spots.

Come meet Eli - up close, in person!  Apply at GHHS.org
